assumptions_to_verify: The supervisor timeout is appropriately configured to allow sufficient time for reviewer responses.
contradictions_checked: Checked if the timeout fix altered any core agentic logic; it only affects the transport layer for the reviewer.
critical_review.strongest_objection: The timeout fix might cause premature timeouts if the supervisor timeout is too short for the LLM response.
critical_review.what_would_change_my_mind: If the timeout fix caused regressions in other transport mechanisms or if the test evidence was invalid.

assumptions_to_verify: The supervisor timeout is appropriately configured to allow sufficient time for reviewer responses.
contradictions_checked: Checked if the timeout fix altered any core agentic logic; it only affects the transport layer for the reviewer.
critical_review.strongest_objection: The timeout fix might cause premature timeouts if the supervisor timeout is too short for the LLM response.
critical_review.what_would_change_my_mind: If the timeout fix caused regressions in other transport mechanisms or if the test evidence was invalid.

assumptions_to_verify: Downstream consumers treat independent_reviewer_panel_decision.aggregation_mode/calibration as the source of truth for active weighting, not only workflow_route.reviewer_panel_calibration_active.
The recorded Codex full-suite output in test-evidence.md is trustworthy and not superseded by a later unrecorded failing run.
The intended current active reviewer roster for this task is litellm_structured gemini-3.1-pro-preview plus codex_cli gpt-5.5, matching the calibration artifact.
contradictions_checked: Calibration artifact and report file hashes match test-evidence.md file-hash claims.
Calibration artifact source_provenance shows 16 auditable real reviewer outputs, 0 fixture rows, 32 transcript refs.
load_reviewer_panel_calibration accepts the fresh artifact and returns calibration_sha256 dfa4b57fe98035dc35b786de11e0103abf05416c2dad2974d84b50f55966babf.
Matching active reviewer runtime/provider/lineage uses calibrated_weighted; changed runtime/provider/lineage falls back to conservative.
Important revise remains blocking_reviewer_objection and does not enter calibrated accept aggregation.
cursor_agent OpenAI-compatible path includes timeout, and the regression asserts the client kwargs include timeout.
missing_evidence: I did not rerun pytest in this gate; I relied on test-evidence.md and transcript receipts per recovery instruction.
No workflow-result-cli-rerun11.json is present; post-timeout recovery acceptance is evidenced by outcome-review.md/transcript gate events instead.
A larger representative calibration set would improve confidence but is not required by the current acceptance text.
critical_review.strongest_objection: The weakest non-blocking issue is calibration data quality: the artifact is only 8 labeled tasks/16 reviewer outputs and reviewer-0 false-accepts all block-required rows. That would be a blocker if the requirement were reviewer reliability weighting, but the stated scope is measured dependency/severity weighting with hard-block preservation, and that is implemented.
critical_review.what_would_change_my_mind: Return revise if a rerun shows the calibration hash is not reproducible, if roster-mismatched calibration can still affect aggregation, if a critical/important revise can advance, if the full-suite evidence is falsified, or if downstream gate logic advances based on the route-level active flag despite conservative aggregation.
